creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
OpenSSH port has a patches/patch-ax file which is blank causing patch
to report:

===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for OpenSSH-2.1.1
  I can't seem to find a patch in there anywhere.

Fix: 

remove patches/patch-ax file.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
cd /usr/ports/security/openssh
make patch
